briefs.title: WorkSafeBC OHS Regulation updated: respirator and helmet standards tightened, combustible dust rules added
briefs.summary: BC's Occupational Health and Safety Regulation is amended in two phases (April 2026 and January 2027) to update respirator standards to CSA Z94.4-18, expand accepted cycling helmet standards, and add new combustible dust hazard requirements.
briefs.action_required: Audit your PPE inventory and workplace hazard assessments to ensure compliance with updated respirator and combustible dust standards before April 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: WorkSafeBC OHS Regulation amendments (Appendix A) take effect — respirator and helmet standards
WorkSafeBC OHS Regulation amendments (Appendix B) take effect — combustible dust rules

briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Natural Resources, Labour & Employment
